criteria.criterion: pyproject.toml adds pyjwt[crypto] to [mcp]; make typecheck resolves the imports.

citation.description: All 8 REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_* keys registered in MCP_ENV_VARS; server.json lines 112-149 match; docs/mcp-reference.md lines 98-105 document all keys

criteria.criterion: The auth_jwt_* flat keys (including auth_jwt_jwks_timeout) are registered in MCP_ENV_VARS/server.json, appear in the regenerated reference docs, and scripts/check_server_manifest.py passes.

citation.description: test_valid_jwt_yields_access_token asserts result.resource==RESOURCE, scopes, and result.expires_at==exp (exact value)

criteria.criterion: Unit test asserts: a JWT with correct iss/aud(=resource) → AccessToken with expected scopes AND resource==auth_resource_server_url and expires_at equal to the token's exp claim.

citation.description: test_rejects_bad_claims parametrized for iss/aud/exp/nbf; test_rejects_alg_none; test_rejects_hs256_signed_with_public_key — all distinct negative controls

criteria.criterion: Unit tests assert rejection for: wrong iss; aud ≠ auth_resource_server_url; expired exp; nbf in the future; alg:none; and HS256 token signed with RSA public key as HMAC secret.

citation.description: test_expected_typ_enforced_when_set and test_typ_skipped_when_unset cover both branches

criteria.criterion: Unit test asserts that with auth_jwt_expected_typ=at+JWT set, a token with absent/mismatched typ is rejected and matching is accepted; and with expected_typ unset the check is skipped.
Unit test asserts the verifier refuses to start when auth_jwt_algorithms includes a symmetric algorithm (HS256/HS384/HS512).

Unit test asserts construction-time SSRF guards: http:// jwks_uri rejected; private/link-local host rejected by default and accepted with allow_private_jwks_host=true; JWKS client constructed with timeout=10.

citation.description: test_jwks_fetch_failure_denies uses _RaisingJWKClient that raises PyJWKClientConnectionError; verifier returns None (non-acceptance)

criteria.criterion: Unit test asserts a JWKS fetch failure raises (→ composite non-acceptance/deny), distinct from a definitively-invalid token which returns None.

citation.description: test_unknown_kid_cooldown_exactly_one_fetch uses asyncio.gather with 8 concurrent unknown kids, asserts total==1; test_rotated_key_validates_after_cooldown uses cooldown=0 to verify legitimate rotation still refetches

criteria.criterion: Unit test asserts unknown-kid cooldown is concurrency-safe: burst of concurrent requests with distinct unknown kids triggers exactly one JWKS fetch; rotated key validates after cooldown elapses.

citation.description: test_jwt_transport_valid_200_garbage_401 uses starlette.testclient.TestClient (which wraps httpx.Client with ASGITransport internally), asserts ok.status_code==200 and bad.status_code==401 end-to-end

criteria.criterion: Integration test (httpx ASGITransport) asserts a valid JWKS-issued token → 200 and a garbage bearer → 401 end-to-end through the transport.

citation.description: All test code is concrete and non-stub; CI attestation in ticket comment cites Gerrit change 717 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/717) with Verified+1 across py3.11/3.12/3.13 + macOS, providing corroborating evidence

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test pass.
